[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000001 2
1 1011001 4
2 0100000 1
3 0000110 2
4 1101100 4
5 0010000 1
6 1001000 2
7 0000000 a

01 10 0000010 1
12 21 0000100 1
23 32 1000000 1
34 43 1010001 3
45 54 0000000 a match 7
56 65 0000100 1

70 07 0101000 2

13 31 0010000 1 match 5

35 53 0000000 a match 7
